name: Steak Au Poivre
recipeIngredient: 1 Sirloin Steak, 2 Or 3 inches Thick, fat removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from steak.
2. Crush peppercorns to handfuls by spreading evenly on a board, covering with a dish towel, and crushing with a rolling pin.
3. Pound pepper into each surface of the steak, which has been lightly brushed with oil.
4. Wrap steak loosely in waxed paper; refrigerate several hours or overnight.
5. Do not salt.
6. Allow steak to stand at room temperature before cooking.
7. Heat heavy skillet red hot and coat with a little oil.
8. Sear steak on each side for 3 minutes, then remove skillet from heat.
9. Salt the steak.
10. Place in a moderate oven (350°F) and bake for 20 to 25 minutes for rare or 30 to 35 minutes for medium rare.
11. Spread lemon butter, made by blending melted butter and lemon juice to taste, over the steak.
12. Slice very thinly.
Serves: 8
Source: "Mountain Measures"--Junior League of Charleston, WV. Ed. 1974
